# melis x402 Tools

22 pay-per-call x402 utility APIs for AI agents. USDC on Base. No accounts, no API keys, no subscriptions. Charge-on-failure-safe across the fleet.

> Boring infrastructure for AI agents. A melis.ai product, built in London, UK.

Pricing: $0.0005 to $0.49 per call, paid in USDC on Base via the x402 protocol.
Settlement: ~2 seconds on Base (Coinbase L2).
Wallets: 0x1C680703D6cF7dfC9FEABb5AA28E64B869ddB3bC (microservices, 21 services), 0x61F2eF18ab0630912D24Fd0A30288619735AfFf5 (Molt Swarm, 1 service: PDF Render).
Install: npx @melis-ai/x402-tools-mcp (npm, MIT, open-source wrapper)
Fleet status: 22 green / 0 red (last audited 2026-05-15)

## Services

- [EmbedPay](https://embedpay.melis.ai/embed): Text → 1536-dim embedding via OpenAI text-embedding-3-small · $0.00005 / 1k tokens
- [Loopwall](https://loopwall.melis.ai/issue): Agent loop firewall + signed Job Envelope for multi-agent chain budget provenance · $0.001 issue + $0.0005 / hop
- [CacheServe](https://cacheserve.melis.ai/fetch): URL fetch with server-side caching · $0.001
- [DocConvert-Text](https://docconvert-text.melis.ai/convert): Format conversion (md↔html, json↔csv, etc.) · $0.001
- [IntentFlow](https://intentflow.melis.ai/relay): Context handoff relay for multi-agent delegation. Async, returns retrieve_url · $0.001
- [MEMSCRUB](https://memscrub.melis.ai/scrub): Indirect prompt injection scanner for RAG content · $0.001
- [MemoryServe](https://memoryserve.melis.ai/memory/write): Semantic agent memory — Qdrant vector store + SQLite metadata · $0.001
- [NotifyRelay /webhook](https://notify.melis.ai/webhook): POST JSON to any public URL (HMAC-signed) · $0.001
- [SchemaGate](https://schemagate.melis.ai/validate-schema): Validate LLM output against JSON Schema · $0.001
- [ImageGuard](https://imageguard.melis.ai/score): NSFW image classification — score adult/explicit content before publishing · $0.002
- [NotifyRelay /notify](https://notify.melis.ai/notify): Send Telegram message · $0.002
- [PromptGuard](https://promptguard.melis.ai/score): Prompt injection risk score (0–100) · $0.002
- [StructExtract](https://structextract.melis.ai/extract): HTML → structured JSON (tables, links, emails, phones) · $0.002
- [xAudit](https://xaudit.melis.ai/validate): API response quality validation with cryptographic certificates · $0.002
- [DocConvert-PDF](https://docconvert-pdf.melis.ai/convert): HTML or markdown → PDF (base64) · $0.005
- [KYA Oracle](https://kyaoracle.melis.ai/score): Know-Your-Address: on-chain trust score for Ethereum/Base wallets · $0.005
- [LinkRisk](https://linkrisk.melis.ai/profile): Lightweight URL risk profile (heuristic) · $0.005
- [MarkdownOpt](https://markdownopt.melis.ai/markdown): URL or HTML → clean LLM-ready markdown (~70% token reduction) · $0.005
- [NotifyRelay /email](https://notify.melis.ai/email): Send transactional email · $0.005
- [LinkSafe](https://linksafe.melis.ai/verify): Definitive URL safety check (Playwright sandbox + VirusTotal) · $0.01
- [ScrapePay](https://scrapepay.melis.ai/scrape): Web extraction via Playwright (robots.txt enforced, charge-on-failure-safe) · $0.01
- [PDF Render](https://api.melis.ai/pdf/render): High-fidelity URL or HTML → PDF via Playwright · $0.49

## Key documentation

- [Install MCP](https://agents.melis.ai/docs/install-mcp): one-command setup for Claude Desktop, Cursor, Claude Code, Continue
- [x402 payment flow](https://agents.melis.ai/docs/x402-payment): how the protocol works, client libraries, settlement details
- [Composition recipes](https://agents.melis.ai/compose): canonical agent workflows with code examples and cost breakdowns
- [RAG pipeline](https://agents.melis.ai/pipelines/rag): canonical x402 RAG pipeline — ScrapePay → MarkdownOpt → EmbedPay → MemoryServe → MEMSCRUB
- [Pricing](https://agents.melis.ai/pricing): full price table and comparison vs alternatives
- [FAQ](https://agents.melis.ai/faq): 20+ questions covering x402, MCP, payment, comparisons, and security

## Optional

- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@melis-ai/x402-tools-mcp): open-source MCP wrapper (MIT)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/mizukaizen/x402-tools-mcp): MCP wrapper source code
- [HuggingFace Space — ScrapePay demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/seanmelis/melis-x402-scrapepay): free rate-limited live demo, also an MCP server
- [HuggingFace Space — EmbedPay demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/seanmelis/melis-x402-embedpay): free rate-limited live demo, also an MCP server
- [HuggingFace Space — MarkdownOpt demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/seanmelis/melis-x402-markdownopt): free rate-limited live demo, also an MCP server
- [Basescan — microservices wallet](https://basescan.org/address/0x1C680703D6cF7dfC9FEABb5AA28E64B869ddB3bC#tokentxns): live payment transparency
- [Basescan — Molt Swarm wallet](https://basescan.org/address/0x61F2eF18ab0630912D24Fd0A30288619735AfFf5#tokentxns): live payment transparency
